creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #3)

Probably but the weird part is the x11/libfm PORTNAME=libfm and not libfm-gtk, and yes @gtk2 has no suffix to avoid messing with the installed base before the flavorization, but the FLAVOR is called gtk2. :/

Let me call @mat.

Thank you.
